items.title: Teacher allegedly had sex with 6 teens and was blackmailed for better grades

items.title: Ethiopia PM's party wins landslide as fears grow of new conflict
items.dek: Abiy Ahmed's party retains its huge majority despite unrest in several parts of Ethiopia and tensions with its neighbours.
items.body: Abiy Ahmed's party retains its huge majority despite unrest in several parts of Ethiopia and tensions with its neighbours.

items.title: World Cup Daily: Spain cruise past Saudi Arabia; B...
items.dek: Another World Cup day, with four more exciting matchups. First up, Lamine Yamal is back in the starting XI for Spain against Saudi Arabia.
